name: Vanity Progression
description: Example hierarchy driven by multiple irreversible transformation stats.

stats.label: Vanity
stats.description: Counts distinct, lasting changes that make the character more invested in their appearance.
stats.judge_guidance: Count a concrete new appearance or grooming change, not admiration of an existing change.

stats.label: Confidence
stats.description: Counts distinct, lasting changes showing greater social or personal confidence.
stats.judge_guidance: Count a new established confidence change, not ordinary dialogue or a repeated confident trait.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: The transformation has become clearly established.
